description: Meta-ad copy that paraphrases dollar values via prose ('small refundable deposit') instead of stating them. Should PASS FMTH-NO-DOLLAR-METAAD. Confirms the Task 3 rewrite pattern (PR #94) is forward-compatible with the new no-$ rule. PICKUP 2026-04-27 task 4.
text:
Be part of FarmThru. Lock in early access to invest when our CSF round opens.

Reserve your spot with a small refundable deposit. VIP investors get the offer link before the public link goes live.

See the general CSF risk warning + offer document.
